entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum hybrid CSH 6 used in the study

entities.name: CHARCOAL STALK ROT
entities.description: A disease of sorghum caused by Macrophomina phaseolina

entities.name: MOISTURE DEFICIT STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by lack of water, created by withholding irrigation

entities.name: PLANT POPULATION DENSITY
entities.description: The number of plants per unit area, specifically tested at 266,700 plants ha-1

entities.name: PATHOGEN INOCULATION
entities.description: The technique of introducing a pathogen into the plant

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The location where the research was conducted

entities.name: MACROPHOMINA PHASEOLINA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes charcoal stalk rot

entities.name: WITHHOLDING IRRIGATION
entities.description: The process of stopping water supply to induce moisture stress

entities.name: NATURAL INFECTION
entities.description: Infection of the plant occurring naturally in the environment

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INOCULATION
entities.description: The deliberate introduction of M. phaseolina into the plant

entities.name: LODGING
entities.description: The first external symptom of charcoal rot

entities.name: SOFT STALK
entities.description: A symptom used to measure the severity of charcoal rot

entities.name: ROOT DAMAGE
entities.description: A symptom used to measure the severity of charcoal rot

entities.name: PLANT SENESCENCE
entities.description: A symptom used to measure the severity of charcoal rot

entities.name: FLAG LEAF VISIBLE IN THE WHORL
entities.description: A specific plant growth stage where moisture stress significantly induces lodging
